title: Operational dense-tile and score-SRAM cluster closure for Llama7B
hypothesis: The precision-aligned separated two-pass point can remain near 1.595 ms/token after replacing the narrow dense-tile PPA harness with an operational accumulating tile and placing logically banked score SRAM beside two attention heads in a hierarchical cluster.

direct_comparison.primary_question: How far do operational accumulator state, banked SRAM wiring, divider sharing, and local cluster routing move the measured Llama7B throughput, energy, and area frontier?
include: 16x8 signed-int8 outer-product tile with all 128 signed accumulators observable through a result stream
16Kx256 synchronous score bank composed from 56 fakeram45_2048x39 proxy macros
two score banks and two heads per cluster
one cluster-shared divider versus one divider per head
dual_mac accounting with 1710 operational tile instances distributed across 16 clusters
hierarchical Nangate45 synthesis and proxy-macro placement
exclude: do not claim SRAM signoff from FakeRAM LEF/LIB views without GDS
do not promote a 16-cluster result before operational tile and score-bank equivalence pass
HBM vendor-current signoff remains a later boundary

required_evaluations.objective: Prove the operational 16x8 signed-int8 tile accumulates and streams the same complete GEMM state as the reference model under stalls and backpressure.

expected_result.reason: The prior compute PPA harness folds MAC outputs into a hash and does not embody the complete accumulating producer state.

required_evaluations.objective: Measure Nangate45 PPA for the operational 16x8 signed-int8 accumulating tile at 10 ns, 6 ns, and the feasible timing boundary.

expected_result.reason: Operational accumulator area, power, and delay must replace the narrow harness values before cluster scaling.

required_evaluations.objective: Prove the 56-macro bank implements one non-aliasing synchronous 16Kx256 1RW score store with one-cycle read selection.

expected_result.reason: The CACTI score-store quantity must map to an explicit depth/width banking network before physical placement.

required_evaluations.objective: Place and route one logically banked 16Kx256 score store using Nangate45 FakeRAM LEF/LIB proxy views.

expected_result.reason: Measure banking mux, macro pin, halo, congestion, and timing overhead while retaining an explicit no-GDS proxy qualification.

required_evaluations.objective: Replace proxy compute and analytical score-memory area/timing in the separated two-pass frontier with measured operational component PPA.

expected_result.reason: Measured component area and timing must be propagated before selecting the physical cluster; vectorless power must not replace activity-backed token energy.

required_evaluations.objective: Measure a two-head cluster with operational dual compute streams, two score banks, and shared versus per-head dividers.

expected_result.reason: Local composition must close before extrapolating 16 clusters or charging chip-level NoC.

remaining_abstractions_after_this_step: The installed FakeRAM views have LEF/LIB but no SRAM GDS and therefore remain physical proxies.
The 16-cluster NoC, global clock/reset, and top-level power distribution remain to be composed.
